postCreateCommand:
mkdir -p ~/.vnc && printf 'password
' | vncpasswd -f > ~/.vnc/passwd && chmod 600 ~/.vnc/passwd && git clone https://github.com/novnc/noVNC.git
postStartCommand: sudo tailscaled --tun=userspace-networking --socks5-server=localhost:1055 & sleep 3 && sudo tailscale up --authkey=${TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY:-} && vncserver -xstartup 'cinnamon-session' -geometry 1280x720 -rfbport 5900 && ./noVNC/utils/novnc_proxy --vnc 127.0.0.1:5900 --listen localhost:6080
